tasks.name: Implement sync engine with incremental byte-offset sync and batch transactions
Wire CLI sync subcommand with clap and end-to-end integration

verification.cli_help: pass - claude-history sync --help shows projects_dir and db_path options
verification.real_data_first_sync: pass - 6,257 files discovered, 6,243 synced, 768,316 records ingested, 0 errors, 165 warnings, 655 drift fields
verification.real_data_second_sync: pass - 6,255 of 6,257 files skipped (2 had new writes from active sessions), demonstrating incremental byte-offset sync
verification.drift_detection: pass - 655 entries in schema_drift_log from overflow fields in real data

spec_success_criteria.criterion_1_tables_populated: pass - all 13 target tables have data after sync against real ~/.claude/projects/
spec_success_criteria.criterion_2_incremental_sync: pass - second sync skips 6,255 of 6,257 files, only processing 2 files with new writes
spec_success_criteria.criterion_3_malformed_resilience: pass - 165 warnings logged from real data, all valid records still processed (tested in unit tests and confirmed in real data)
spec_success_criteria.criterion_4_schema_drift: pass - 655 drift entries captured from overflow fields in real JSONL data
spec_success_criteria.criterion_5_wal_migrations_binary: pass - WAL mode active, schema_versions has '001', single binary at target/debug/claude-history
